title: Hellcat
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Hell|more=Cat}}
[[File:Hellcat_es.jpg|thumb|right|250px|''Hellcat 3'' under fire from a [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]].]]
[[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle]]s '''''Hellcat''''' served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] deployed Shuttles ''Hellcat'' during [[Treachery at Ottega]]. ''Hellcat'' flanked Escort Shuttles [[Haven group|''Haven'']] as Zaarin's forces attempted to kidnap [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, led by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], destroyed Shuttles ''Hellcat'' in the early stages of the battle.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
